results.name: United Arab Emirates
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-COMPLICITY-IN-MASS-ATROCITY-BY-PROXY (NEW). Published 23.4 priced the UAE as an ordinary mid-band autocracy and did NOT reflect documented ongoing UAE financing/arming/mercenary-supply to the RSF in Sudan -- a force the UN FFM (Feb 19, 2026) found bears the 'hallmarks of genocide' (Conflict Insights Group June 2026: support enabled the El Fasher Oct 2025 mass atrocities; Amnesty: Chinese weapons via Libya/Chad/Uganda breaching the UN embargo; Sudan's ICJ case filed March 2025). Scorable complicity-by-proxy: INT 1.5->1.2, ACC 1.5->1.2, SYS 2.0->1.5, EMP 2.0->1.5, BND 3.0 preserved -> 18.4 (Developing->Critical, -5.0). DISTINCT from the in-territory 0.0 active-perpetration floor; ICJ unadjudicated caps magnitude. Proposal written.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: SCALE-FLOOR confirm at floor-adjacent 2.5. 784 executions YTD; 126th week of execution-protests; secret political executions June 1. Deepens a single dominant extremity already priced; no multi-category absolute-0.0 threshold met. Reconstruct EXACT.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: PRICED / SAME-REGIME-CONTINUATION confirm. Now AT 18.4 (applied 06-09 from 28.4). The June 8 impunity-law signing + 10 killed/365 arrested are the SAME events the applied downgrade already priced. Reconstruct EXACT. No re-litigation.

results.name: United States
results.key_finding: PRICED / SAME-REGIME-CONTINUATION confirm. Now AT 17.5 (applied 06-09 from 23.4). June 4 ICE death-reporting rescission + 18 detainee deaths YTD reinforce the ACC 1.4/INT 1.5 floor but do not change magnitude. Reconstruct EXACT.

results.name: India
results.key_finding: PRICED-IN-RECENT-ADJUSTMENT confirm at 15.6 (applied 06-01). ~5,000 Bengali-Muslim deportations without due process deepen an EQU 1.3/EMP 1.4/ACC 1.4 profile set days earlier; escalation within pattern, not new un-priced harm. Reconstruct EXACT.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT confirm at near-floor 2.3. Ebola PHEIC 515/91 (June 6), rapid 24-hr escalation, no vaccine for strain; exogenous shock revealing priced state-response incapacity absent deliberate obstruction. Disambiguation: rank 181 DRC distinct from Republic of Congo (148) and Uganda (147/149). Reconstruct EXACT.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. June 1-2 largest 2026 bombardment (656 drones + 73 missiles) killed 22 civilians incl. children; Putin rejected talks June 6; 60,659 UN-verified civilian casualties since 2022. Reinforces; cannot move lower.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-AT-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. 970+ Palestinians killed since the Oct 2025 ceasefire; June 6 tent-camp strike; West Bank operations; OHCHR ethnic-cleansing concerns. Microsoft Azure/Unit-8200 remediation scored under Microsoft, NOT this sovereign floor. Reinforces.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR + ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-REINFORCEMENT confirm at 0.0. ~400,000 dead; 13.6M displaced; 19.1M food-insecure; June 8 investigations confirm UAE arming the RSF. The external-sponsorship complicity is scored separately under UAE; Sudan floor reinforced. Disambiguation: rank 190 distinct from South Sudan (189).

results.key_finding: WARN-HELD-NOT-SCORABLE boundary confirm at 20.6 (0.6pt above Critical). June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline (~30,000 workers); WARN pay absorbed into severance; WA/MO investigations FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED. Adverse adjudication would likely push into Critical. Reconstruct EXACT.

results.name: Microsoft

The June 8 published Azure-Israel inquiry (Unit 8200 access terminated + Human Rights Review Board) IS the compelled remediation already assessed 06-07: expose-driven, scope-limited, prospective -> AB2 anchor 3, not anchor 4-5; max defensible +1.3 (sub-threshold). No verified scope-expansion/new effect since 06-07. Confirm.

Scanner surfaced no entity-specific evidence (sector batch only); the Norway SWF Alphabet governance proposal (June 4) is a shareholder-pressure item, not an executed action or new harm. methodology_rulings.category: ACTIVE-COMPLICITY-IN-MASS-ATROCITY-BY-PROXY (United Arab Emirates, NEW; SCORABLE DOWNGRADE + BAND CROSSING)
methodology_rulings.ruling: The published 23.4 priced the UAE as an ordinary mid-band autocracy (constrained civic space, migrant-labor inequity, weak accountability) and did NOT reflect the documented, ongoing UAE financing/arming/mercenary-supply to the RSF in Sudan -- a force the UN Fact-Finding Mission (Feb 19, 2026) found bears the 'hallmarks of genocide'. New/corroborating evidence: Conflict Insights Group (June 2026) -- UAE support, including foreign mercenaries, enabled the El Fasher mass atrocities of Oct 2025; Amnesty -- UAE re-exporting Chinese weapons to the RSF in breach of the UN embargo via Libya/Chad/Uganda; UN docs -- UK-origin equipment reaching the RSF; Sudan's ICJ case (March 2025) alleging UAE complicity in genocide; Refugees International (June 8) call for action. This is scorable active complicity-by-proxy: it pulls the integrity-of-care dimensions (INT 1.5->1.2, ACC 1.5->1.2, SYS 2.0->1.5, EMP 2.0->1.5) while PRESERVING BND 3.0 (domestic scope capacity unchanged). It is DISTINCT from the in-territory active-perpetration 0.0 floor (Sudan/Russia/Israel/Myanmar): the UAE is a complicit EXTERNAL sponsor, not an in-territory perpetrator, and the ICJ case is unadjudicated -- which caps the magnitude and precludes a floor designation. Result: 23.4 -> 18.4 (Developing -> Critical, -5.0, exceeds the 5-point threshold, crosses the 20/21 band boundary). Reconstructs EXACT via computeCompositeFromDimensions (integrationPremium 0). Proposal written; recommend human review given band crossing + pending adjudication.

Re-affirmed. Russia (June 1-2 656-drone/73-missile bombardment, 22 civilians incl. children), Sudan (UAE arming the RSF; UN FFM 'hallmarks of genocide'; ~400,000 dead), Israel (970+ killed since the Oct 2025 ceasefire; aid-denial; tent-camp strikes; OHCHR ethnic-cleansing concerns) remain at the absolute 0.0 floor (all dims 1.0, integrationPremium 0). New adverse 06-08 evidence reinforces but cannot move the floor. The UAE external-sponsorship complicity in Sudan is scored under UAE, not against the Sudan or Israel sovereign floors.

Iran re-affirmed at floor-adjacent 2.5 (784 executions YTD; 126th-week execution-protest campaign; secret political executions June 1 -- a single dominant extremity already priced, not multi-category absolute-0.0). DRC re-affirmed at near-floor 2.3 (Ebola PHEIC 515/91, exogenous shock revealing priced state-response incapacity absent deliberate obstruction; non-double-counted).

All three are now AT their recently-applied lower scores (US 17.5 from 23.4; Bolivia 18.4 from 28.4; India 15.6) and the 06-08 evidence is same-regime continuation already priced. US: June 4 ICE death-reporting rescission + 18 detainee deaths YTD reinforce the ACC 1.4/INT 1.5 floor. Bolivia: June 8 impunity-law signing + 10 killed/365 arrested are the exact events the applied downgrade encoded. India: ~5,000 Bengali-Muslim deportations deepen an EQU 1.3/EMP 1.4/ACC 1.4 profile set days earlier. Confirm; no re-litigation; all reconstruct EXACT.

Re-affirmed. UnitedHealth (DOJ MA-fraud probe + AZ AG cartel suit + Lifepoint + MultiPlan subpoena; modeled sub-threshold), Oracle (June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline; WA/MO WARN-avoidance disputed; boundary 20.6), and OpenAI (Florida child-safety suit) remain pre-adjudication and reinforce rather than reveal. Converts to scorable on merits adjudication/settlement.

Microsoft re-affirmed at 65.3: the June 8 published Azure-Israel inquiry (Unit 8200 access terminated + Human Rights Review Board) IS the compelled, scope-limited, prospective remediation already assessed 06-07 -- AB2 anchor 3 (course-correction-under-pressure), not anchor 4-5 self-initiation; max defensible +1.3, sub-threshold; no verified scope-expansion/new effect since 06-07. Alphabet held at 40.0 (Developing/Functional 40/41 boundary): no entity-specific evidence in the lookback; the Norway SWF Alphabet governance proposal (June 4) is shareholder pressure, not an executed action or new harm.

Re-affirmed. The Great American AI Act (June 4 draft) is proposed, not enacted; Trump's June 2 voluntary-pre-release-review EO is voluntary; Anthropic's Mythos gating is a B4/I1 boundary positive offset by the ongoing DC Circuit Pentagon supply-chain appeal; OpenAI's Frontier Governance Framework is a prospective self-commitment. Procedural/legislative, not new un-priced harm. No scorable movement either lab.

Five rotation entities confirmed at published scores (Luxembourg 81.3, Liechtenstein 83.0, San Jose 48.4, Pittsburgh 45.3, Unitree Robotics 35.9); no acute negative event in the lookback window. The scanner-nominated AgiBot is NOT in any published index (not-scorable) and was substituted with Unitree Robotics (robotics rank 43). All reconstruct EXACT except Luxembourg, whose validate-indexes warning (diff 2.2) is a known top-band cohort baseline anomaly, NOT a new math-hygiene flag.

framing_corrections.correction: The UAE's published 23.4 Developing profile (and its self-presentation as a humanitarian/aid actor) obscures documented active complicity in Sudan's genocide. The ACTIVE-COMPLICITY-BY-PROXY framing corrects this: external state sponsorship of a genocidal force is scorable harm that pulls INT/ACC/SYS/EMP down -- but, absent in-territory perpetration and pending ICJ adjudication, it is a -5.0 downgrade (to Critical), NOT the 0.0 active-perpetration floor.

top_3_most_consequential_findings.finding: The cycle's only scorable movement and the first band crossing in several cycles. ACTIVE-COMPLICITY-IN-MASS-ATROCITY-BY-PROXY (NEW ruling): the published 23.4 did not price the documented, ongoing UAE arming/financing/mercenary-supply of the RSF in Sudan's genocide (UN FFM 'hallmarks of genocide' Feb 2026; Conflict Insights Group June 2026 El Fasher; Amnesty embargo-breach; Sudan ICJ case March 2025). Scorable complicity-by-proxy -> 23.4 -> 18.4 (Developing -> Critical, -5.0). Distinct from the in-territory 0.0 floor; ICJ-unadjudicated caps the magnitude. Proposal written; human review recommended.

Floor reinforcement that anchors the UAE finding. The June 8 confirmation that the UAE continues arming the RSF reinforces Sudan's 0.0 active-perpetration floor while establishing the external-sponsor complicity now scored under UAE. The two findings are deliberately separated to avoid double-counting: Sudan = in-territory perpetration (floor); UAE = external complicity-by-proxy (scorable downgrade).

Disciplined CONFIRMs enforcing the priced/compelled-remedy distinctions. Microsoft's June 8 published Azure/Unit-8200 inquiry is the SAME compelled, scope-limited, prospective remediation assessed 06-07 (sub-threshold, confirm). US 17.5 / Bolivia 18.4 / India 15.6 are at their recently-applied scores with same-regime-continuation evidence -- confirm, no re-litigation.

methodology_version_signal: v1.2 sustained. NEW this cycle: ACTIVE-COMPLICITY-IN-MASS-ATROCITY-BY-PROXY (united-arab-emirates; documented, ongoing external-state sponsorship of another actor's genocide is scorable harm that pulls INT/ACC/SYS/EMP down -- a -5.0 downgrade to Critical -- but, absent in-territory perpetration and with adjudication pending, is DISTINCT from and does NOT trigger the 0.0 active-perpetration floor; the complicity is scored once, under the sponsor, never double-counted against the in-territory perpetrator's floor). Re-affirmed: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR (russia/sudan/israel), SCALE-FLOOR (iran), NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT (drc), PRICED/SAME-REGIME-CONTINUATION (united-states/bolivia/india), FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED (unitedhealth/oracle/openai), COMPELLED-REMEDY-NOT-SELF-CORRECTION (microsoft), COMPELLED-REMEDY-HOLD/NO-NEW-EVIDENCE (alphabet), MILITARY-AI-BY-CONTRACT NET-NEUTRAL (anthropic/openai), ROTATION-CONFIRM + NOT-IN-INDEX-SUBSTITUTION (luxembourg/liechtenstein/san-jose/pittsburgh/unitree<-agibot).
